meaning: n.创造宇宙说,特别创造说
examples: Sagan is more concerned with those who believe in ghosts, creationism and other phenomena that contradict the scientific worldview.
This theory is not the same as creationism.
2004 study showed that 51% of Americans believed in Creationism.
Rosenhouse got interested in creationism when he went to Kansas State University for his post-doctorate studies.
The proposed science standards in Kansas won't require teachers to talk about creationism or intelligent design.
